segments.text: But honestly, from here on things are looking pretty drawn out compared to the pacing we've been seeing.
segments.original_text: ただね結構こっからがね先ほどから見てると長いなという印象はあります

full_text: But honestly, from here on things are looking pretty drawn out compared to the pacing we've been seeing. HO's side got exposed... The KO denial...

corrections.original: バレットの栄一郎側のね
